summary: First-run end-to-end test on Independent Media Hub. All 23 backend pytest tests PASS. All critical UI flows verified: login (both roles + wrong creds), admin dashboard/reps/inventory/TV projects/proposals, rep campaign builder (live summary math correct, POST /api/campaigns succeeded), rep TV sponsorship (episode selection + confirm POST /api/sponsorships), 409 on duplicate episode verified via API test, proposal creation via API, reports scoped correctly. Auth guards (403 for rep on admin endpoints, 403 for admin on POST /api/campaigns) verified.

issues: Recharts ResponsiveContainer warns about width(-1)/height(-1) at initial render; chart still renders but console noise. Not blocking.

Country field is a shadcn Select (searchable combobox) with data-testid on trigger, so plain text fill cannot fill it in scripts; UX-wise it is fine for humans but requires opening dropdown to pick. Not a bug — noted for future test scripts.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single 810-line file — consider splitting into routers (auth, admin, campaigns, tv, proposals, reports) as the app grows.

CORS_ORIGINS defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True — browsers will reject credentialed requests with wildcard. Currently OK because frontend uses Bearer via localStorage fallback, but httpOnly cookies won't work cross-origin until explicit origin(s) are set in backend/.env.

reset-password endpoint returns 200 even when token is used/expired vs 400 for invalid — flow is consistent; consider rate-limit + brute-force lockout (not implemented; not required by task but noted).
list_tv_projects sponsored_episode_count is set to count of sponsorship docs, not episodes — misleading name (correct value is `sponsored_episodes` list length). Minor.
No pagination on list endpoints (limit 500). Acceptable for closed B2B scale.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@independentmedia.hub / Admin2026! ; Reps: victor.laurent@parismedia.fr / Rep2026! ; amelia.hart@londonhouse.co.uk / Rep2026!
seed_data_creation: Backend seeds admin, 2 sample reps, 49 banner inventory rows, 3 TV projects on startup. UI tests created: 2 campaigns (Paris + London reps), 1 sponsorship on Silent Continents episode, 2 approved proposals. These persist in test_database.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite lives in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (pytest, uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL). Note: campaign builder path is /rep/banners/new (not /rep/campaigns/new). Proposal country uses shadcn Select — must click the Select trigger then pick option, cannot page.fill. Storage endpoint init logs 'Storage initialized' on startup; upload flow was not exercised in UI (admin TV upload not clicked) but /api/admin/upload code path is present and admin auth guard verified.
